title: tanacetum tricholobum
intro: Tanacetum tricholobum, also known as pyrethrum, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family that is native to the mountainous regions of the Himalayas. The plant contains pyrethrin, a natural insecticide with medicinal properties that have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Tanacetum tricholobum include its ability to reduce inflammation and fever, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Tanacetum tricholobum can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, from skin infections to digestive issues.
